prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘bathing tub’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「裝水後供人洗澡或泡澡的大型容器」？

example.text: The hotel room has a deep bathtub beside the shower.

translation.zh-Hant: 這間飯店客房的淋浴間旁有一座很深的浴缸。

meaning.en: A large container filled with water for a person to bathe in.
meaning.zh-Hant: 裝水後供人洗澡或泡澡的大型容器。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘fluent in two languages’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「能流利地說或使用兩種語言的」？

example.text: Our bilingual guide explained the tour in English and Chinese.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們的雙語導遊用英文和中文解說行程。

meaning.en: Able to speak or use two languages fluently.
meaning.zh-Hant: 能流利地說或使用兩種語言的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘have a good trip’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來祝福某人旅途愉快的話」？

example.text: The conductor wished us bon voyage before the train left.

translation.zh-Hant: 火車出發前，列車長祝我們旅途愉快。

meaning.en: A phrase used to wish someone a pleasant journey.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來祝福某人旅途愉快的話。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘avid reader’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「喜愛閱讀並花很多時間讀書的人」？

example.text: Mia is a bookworm who finishes several novels every month.

translation.zh-Hant: 米雅是個書迷，每個月都會讀完好幾本小說。

meaning.en: A person who enjoys reading and spends a great deal of time doing it.
meaning.zh-Hant: 喜愛閱讀並花很多時間讀書的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘with plenty of light’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以發出或反射大量光線的方式」？

example.text: The shop window glowed brightly after sunset.

translation.zh-Hant: 日落後，商店櫥窗亮晃晃地發著光。

meaning.en: In a way that gives off or reflects a lot of light.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以發出或反射大量光線的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘green salad vegetable’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種綠皮、果肉清脆淡白的可食果實，通常當作蔬菜食用」？

example.text: Please add sliced cucumber to the salad.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在沙拉裡加入切片的小黃瓜。

meaning.en: An edible fruit with green skin and crisp, pale flesh, commonly eaten as a vegetable.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種綠皮、果肉清脆淡白的可食果實，通常當作蔬菜食用。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person in charge’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「負責管理部門、專案或製作工作的人」？

example.text: The director approved the revised marketing plan this morning.

translation.zh-Hant: 主管今天早上核准了修訂後的行銷計畫。

meaning.en: A person responsible for managing a department, project, or production.
meaning.zh-Hant: 負責管理部門、專案或製作工作的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in relation to the environment’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以與自然環境有關或會影響自然環境的方式」？

example.text: The hotel now uses environmentally friendly cleaning products.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家飯店現在使用環境友善的清潔用品。

meaning.en: In a way that relates to or affects the natural environment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以與自然環境有關或會影響自然環境的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘prone to forgetting’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「容易忘記事情或記性不好的」？

example.text: I have become forgetful, so I write every appointment down.

translation.zh-Hant: 我變得很健忘，所以會把每個行程都記下來。

meaning.en: Likely to forget things or unable to remember them well.
meaning.zh-Hant: 容易忘記事情或記性不好的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘main entrance’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「房屋或建築物主要入口處的門」？

example.text: Please leave the package beside the front door.

translation.zh-Hant: 請把包裹放在前門旁邊。

meaning.en: The main entrance door of a house or building.
meaning.zh-Hant: 房屋或建築物主要入口處的門。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘fully illuminated moon’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「月亮看起來像完整明亮圓盤時的月相」？

example.text: A full moon rose above the mountains during our night hike.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們夜間健行時，一輪滿月從山後升起。

meaning.en: The phase when the moon appears as a complete illuminated circle.
meaning.zh-Hant: 月亮看起來像完整明亮圓盤時的月相。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘rotary-wing aircraft’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「利用旋轉葉片懸停、往不同方向移動並垂直降落的航空器」？

example.text: A rescue helicopter landed near the injured hikers.

translation.zh-Hant: 一架救援直升機降落在受傷的登山客附近。

meaning.en: An aircraft that uses rotating blades to hover, move in different directions, and land vertically.
meaning.zh-Hant: 利用旋轉葉片懸停、往不同方向移動並垂直降落的航空器。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘countryside walking’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為了休閒或運動而在自然環境中步行的活動」？

example.text: We are going hiking along the coastal trail tomorrow.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們明天要沿著海岸步道健行。

meaning.en: The activity of walking in natural areas for pleasure or exercise.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為了休閒或運動而在自然環境中步行的活動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘domestic chores’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為清潔與打理住家所做的例行工作，例如煮飯或洗衣」？

example.text: We divide the housework so neither person has to do everything.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們會分配家務，這樣就不必由一個人包辦所有事情。

meaning.en: Routine work done to clean and manage a home, such as cooking or washing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為清潔與打理住家所做的例行工作，例如煮飯或洗衣。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘when feasible’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來表示希望在情況允許時完成某事」？

example.text: Please send the revised quote by Friday, if possible.

translation.zh-Hant: 如果可以，請在星期五前寄來修訂後的報價。

meaning.en: Used to request something when circumstances allow it.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來表示希望在情況允許時完成某事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘connection point’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「兩個系統、組織或事物連接並互動的接合點」？

example.text: The app provides a simple interface for booking train tickets.

translation.zh-Hant: 這款應用程式提供簡單的介面來預訂火車票。

meaning.en: A point where two systems, organizations, or subjects connect and interact.
meaning.zh-Hant: 兩個系統、組織或事物連接並互動的接合點。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘needing to be scratched’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「感到刺激不適而想抓癢的」？

example.text: My arms became itchy after I touched the plant.

translation.zh-Hant: 我碰到那株植物後，手臂開始發癢。

meaning.en: Feeling an irritating sensation that makes you want to scratch.
meaning.zh-Hant: 感到刺激不適而想抓癢的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘prevent’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「阻止某事發生，或克制自己不做某事」？

example.text: To keep from missing deadlines, I set calendar reminders.

translation.zh-Hant: 為了避免錯過截止日期，我會設定行事曆提醒。

meaning.en: To prevent or refrain from doing something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 阻止某事發生，或克制自己不做某事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘move out from parents’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不再與父母同住，搬出去建立自己的住處」？

example.text: She plans to leave home after finding a full-time job.

translation.zh-Hant: 她打算找到全職工作後搬離父母家。

meaning.en: To stop living with your parents and establish a separate home.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不再與父母同住，搬出去建立自己的住處。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘share a home’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常指未婚伴侶共同居住」？

example.text: They decided to live together after dating for three years.

translation.zh-Hant: 他們交往三年後，決定一起住。

meaning.en: To share a home as a couple, usually without being married.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常指未婚伴侶共同居住。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘strongly desire’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「強烈渴望某人、某物或某件事」？

example.text: After months abroad, I began to long for food from home.

translation.zh-Hant: 在國外待了幾個月後，我開始想念家鄉的食物。

meaning.en: To feel a strong desire for someone, something, or an event.
meaning.zh-Hant: 強烈渴望某人、某物或某件事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘severely overweight’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「體脂肪過多的，通常指身體質量指數達三十或以上」？

example.text: The clinic offers nutrition support for patients who are obese.

translation.zh-Hant: 這間診所為肥胖患者提供營養協助。

meaning.en: Having an excessive amount of body fat, commonly defined as a body mass index of 30 or higher.
meaning.zh-Hant: 體脂肪過多的，通常指身體質量指數達三十或以上。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘not satisfied’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因期待或需求未獲滿足而感到不滿意的」？

example.text: Several customers were unsatisfied with the slow delivery.

translation.zh-Hant: 幾位顧客對送貨速度太慢感到不滿。

meaning.en: Not pleased or content because expectations or needs have not been met.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因期待或需求未獲滿足而感到不滿意的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ball-tipped pen’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「筆尖利用小型滾動金屬球將墨水帶到紙上的筆」？

example.text: Use a black ballpoint to complete the immigration form.

translation.zh-Hant: 請用黑色原子筆填寫入境表格。

meaning.en: A pen that transfers ink through a small rolling metal ball at its tip.
meaning.zh-Hant: 筆尖利用小型滾動金屬球將墨水帶到紙上的筆。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘as someone's representative’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以另一個人的代表或代理人身分行事」？

example.text: I signed the delivery receipt on behalf of my manager.

translation.zh-Hant: 我代表經理簽收了這批貨。

meaning.en: The role of acting as the representative or agent of another person.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以另一個人的代表或代理人身分行事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘small coffee shop’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供應飲料、點心與簡餐的小型餐館」？

example.text: We met at a quiet cafe near the station.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們在車站附近一間安靜的咖啡館碰面。

meaning.en: A small restaurant that serves drinks, snacks, and simple meals.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供應飲料、點心與簡餐的小型餐館。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘unusually low temperatures’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「戶外氣溫異常偏低的一段時間」？

example.text: Pack a warm coat because cold weather is expected this weekend.

translation.zh-Hant: 這個週末預計天氣寒冷，請帶一件保暖外套。

meaning.en: A period when outdoor temperatures are unusually low.
meaning.zh-Hant: 戶外氣溫異常偏低的一段時間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘surname’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「家族成員共同使用、與名字相對的姓氏」？

example.text: Enter your family name exactly as it appears on your passport.

translation.zh-Hant: 請按照護照上的寫法輸入你的姓氏。

meaning.en: A name shared by members of a family, as distinct from a given name.
meaning.zh-Hant: 家族成員共同使用、與名字相對的姓氏。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘hard-working and persistent’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「做事勤奮、認真且持之以恆的」？

example.text: Her industrious approach helped the team finish ahead of schedule.

translation.zh-Hant: 她勤奮的工作態度幫助團隊提前完成工作。

meaning.en: Working hard in a careful and persistent way.
meaning.zh-Hant: 做事勤奮、認真且持之以恆的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘action or state word’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「表示動作、事件或狀態的詞」？

example.text: In this sentence, travel is used as a verb.

translation.zh-Hant: 在這個句子中，travel 作為動詞使用。

meaning.en: A word that expresses an action, event, or state.
meaning.zh-Hant: 表示動作、事件或狀態的詞。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘written symbols and marks’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「逗號、句號等用來分隔並釐清書面文字各部分的符號」？

example.text: Correct punctuation makes a business email easier to understand.

translation.zh-Hant: 正確的標點符號能讓商務電子郵件更容易理解。

meaning.en: Marks such as commas and periods used to separate and clarify parts of written text.
meaning.zh-Hant: 逗號、句號等用來分隔並釐清書面文字各部分的符號。

primarySenseID: en:any non-alcoholic drink that is carbonated

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘sweet carbonated drink’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常帶甜味、含氣且不含酒精的飲料」？

example.text: The lunch set includes either tea or a soft drink.

translation.zh-Hant: 這份午餐套餐附茶或一杯汽水。

senses.id: en:any non-alcoholic drink that is carbonated

meaning.en: A usually sweet, carbonated drink that does not contain alcohol.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常帶甜味、含氣且不含酒精的飲料。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘bookstore’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「販售書籍的商店」？

example.text: I found a useful travel guide at the airport bookshop.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在機場書店找到一本實用的旅遊指南。

meaning.en: A shop where books are sold.
meaning.zh-Hant: 販售書籍的商店。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘noon’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「白天十二點，也就是正午」？

example.text: The outdoor market becomes crowded around midday.

translation.zh-Hant: 露天市場到了中午左右就會變得很擁擠。

meaning.en: Twelve o'clock in the daytime; noon.
meaning.zh-Hant: 白天十二點，也就是正午。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘jewelry worn on the ear’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「戴在耳朵上或穿過耳洞的飾品」？

example.text: She lost one earring while walking through the night market.

translation.zh-Hant: 她逛夜市時掉了一邊耳環。

meaning.en: A piece of jewelry worn on or through the ear.
meaning.zh-Hant: 戴在耳朵上或穿過耳洞的飾品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘enjoyable and satisfying’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「帶來愉悅、滿足或享受感的」？

example.text: The redesigned lobby has a pleasing balance of light and color.

translation.zh-Hant: 重新設計的大廳在光線與色彩之間取得了令人愉悅的平衡。

meaning.en: Giving a feeling of pleasure, satisfaction, or enjoyment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 帶來愉悅、滿足或享受感的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘score or grade’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來表示品質、能力或表現的數字、字母或標記」？

example.text: The hotel has a high rating for cleanliness and service.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家飯店的整潔度與服務評分都很高。

meaning.en: A number, letter, or mark used to indicate quality, ability, or performance.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來表示品質、能力或表現的數字、字母或標記。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘school-age child’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「正在上學或已達就學年齡的兒童」？

example.text: Every schoolchild received a free safety reflector.

translation.zh-Hant: 每位學童都領到一個免費的安全反光片。

meaning.en: A child who attends school or is old enough to do so.
meaning.zh-Hant: 正在上學或已達就學年齡的兒童。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘famous top performer’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在特定領域極為知名且成功的人」？

example.text: The young chef became a superstar after the television series aired.

translation.zh-Hant: 那部電視節目播出後，這位年輕主廚成了超級明星。

meaning.en: A person who is extremely famous and successful in a particular field.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在特定領域極為知名且成功的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘problem-solving idea session’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由團體提出點子並尋找問題解方的腦力激盪會議」？

example.text: We scheduled a brainstorm to develop a new campaign slogan.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們安排了一場腦力激盪，為新活動發想標語。

meaning.en: A group session for producing ideas and finding solutions to a problem.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由團體提出點子並尋找問題解方的腦力激盪會議。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in another place’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在別處、於其他地方或前往別處」？

example.text: This train is full, so we may need to sit elsewhere.

translation.zh-Hant: 這班火車客滿了，我們可能得坐到別處。

meaning.en: In, at, or to another place.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在別處、於其他地方或前往別處。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘frighten badly’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「使某人感到極度害怕」？

example.text: Sudden turbulence can terrify nervous passengers.

translation.zh-Hant: 突如其來的亂流可能會讓緊張的乘客非常害怕。

meaning.en: To make someone feel extremely frightened.
meaning.zh-Hant: 使某人感到極度害怕。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘unable to sleep’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「沒有睡覺或無法入睡的」？

example.text: Jet lag left me tired after a sleepless night.

translation.zh-Hant: 時差讓我徹夜難眠，隔天疲憊不堪。

meaning.en: Without sleep or unable to sleep.
meaning.zh-Hant: 沒有睡覺或無法入睡的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘riding a skateboard’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「騎乘滑板的活動或運動」？

example.text: Skateboarding is allowed only in the marked area of the park.

translation.zh-Hant: 公園內只有標示的區域可以玩滑板。

meaning.en: The activity or sport of riding a skateboard.
meaning.zh-Hant: 騎乘滑板的活動或運動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘dividing line’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「分隔兩個區域的線或位置」？

example.text: A stone wall marks the boundary of the property.

translation.zh-Hant: 一道石牆標示出這塊土地的邊界。

meaning.en: A line or point that separates two areas.
meaning.zh-Hant: 分隔兩個區域的線或位置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘at no cost’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不需要付費即可取得或使用的」？

example.text: The airport shuttle is free of charge for hotel guests.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店房客可以免費搭乘機場接駁車。

meaning.en: Available without requiring payment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不需要付費即可取得或使用的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘continue making progress’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「繼續向前或持續取得進展」？

example.text: Keep going for two blocks, and the bank will be on your right.

translation.zh-Hant: 繼續往前走兩個街區，銀行就在右手邊。

meaning.en: To continue moving forward or making progress.
meaning.zh-Hant: 繼續向前或持續取得進展。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘document case’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來攜帶商務文件與其他工作用品的扁平提箱」？

example.text: He placed the signed contract in his briefcase.

translation.zh-Hant: 他把簽好的合約放進公事包。

meaning.en: A flat case used for carrying business documents and other work items.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來攜帶商務文件與其他工作用品的扁平提箱。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘downtown area’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「城市中央的商業與購物區」？

example.text: A direct bus connects the airport with the city center.

translation.zh-Hant: 有一班直達公車連接機場與市中心。

meaning.en: The central commercial and shopping district of a city.
meaning.zh-Hant: 城市中央的商業與購物區。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘find by chance’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「意外發現某物或偶然遇見某人」？

example.text: You may come across a small temple while exploring the old town.

translation.zh-Hant: 探索老城時，你可能會偶然發現一座小廟。

meaning.en: To find or encounter someone or something unexpectedly.
meaning.zh-Hant: 意外發現某物或偶然遇見某人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘industrial machines’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「合稱用於生產或其他工作的各種機器設備」？

example.text: Only trained staff may operate the factory machinery.

translation.zh-Hant: 只有受過訓練的員工可以操作工廠機械。

meaning.en: Machines considered together as the equipment used for production or other work.
meaning.zh-Hant: 合稱用於生產或其他工作的各種機器設備。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘work submitted for publication’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「送交出版的書面作品原稿」？

example.text: The editor returned the manuscript with detailed comments.

translation.zh-Hant: 編輯把原稿連同詳細意見退還給作者。

meaning.en: The original form of a written work submitted for publication.
meaning.zh-Hant: 送交出版的書面作品原稿。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘journalists' office’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「記者撰寫、編輯與處理新聞報導的辦公室」？

example.text: The newsroom stayed busy throughout election night.

translation.zh-Hant: 選舉之夜，新聞編輯室整晚都很忙碌。

meaning.en: The office where journalists prepare and process news stories.
meaning.zh-Hant: 記者撰寫、編輯與處理新聞報導的辦公室。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘paid access plan’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「付費取得在特定期間內使用服務或資源的權利」？

example.text: My annual subscription includes unlimited access to the business journal.

translation.zh-Hant: 我的年度訂閱方案包含這份商業期刊的無限閱讀權限。

meaning.en: Paid access to a service or resource for a set period of time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 付費取得在特定期間內使用服務或資源的權利。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘organized series of contests’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「透過一連串競賽決定優勝者的賽事」？

example.text: Sixteen teams will compete in the regional tournament.

translation.zh-Hant: 十六支隊伍將參加這場區域錦標賽。

meaning.en: A series of competitive games used to determine a winner.
meaning.zh-Hant: 透過一連串競賽決定優勝者的賽事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘successful accomplishment’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「憑藉努力或能力成功完成的成果」？

example.text: Launching the product on time was a major achievement for the team.

translation.zh-Hant: 準時推出產品是團隊的一項重大成就。

meaning.en: Something successfully completed through effort or skill.
meaning.zh-Hant: 憑藉努力或能力成功完成的成果。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘company that creates advertisements’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為客戶規劃、製作並管理廣告的公司」？

example.text: The startup hired an advertising agency to launch its new brand.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家新創公司聘請廣告公司來推出新品牌。

meaning.en: A company that plans, creates, and manages advertising for clients.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為客戶規劃、製作並管理廣告的公司。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘make less severe’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「減輕疼痛、困難或問題的嚴重程度」？

example.text: A flexible schedule may alleviate some pressure on working parents.

translation.zh-Hant: 彈性工時或許能減輕在職父母的部分壓力。

meaning.en: To make pain, difficulty, or a problem less severe.
meaning.zh-Hant: 減輕疼痛、困難或問題的嚴重程度。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘list of cited sources’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「列出書面作品中所引用書籍與其他資料來源的部分」？

example.text: Add every report you cited to the bibliography.

translation.zh-Hant: 請把你引用的每份報告都列入參考書目。

meaning.en: A section listing the books and other sources referred to in a written work.
meaning.zh-Hant: 列出書面作品中所引用書籍與其他資料來源的部分。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘unite and cooperate’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「團結合作或達成共識」？

example.text: The two departments must come together to solve the delivery problem.

translation.zh-Hant: 這兩個部門必須合作解決配送問題。

meaning.en: To unite, cooperate, or reach an agreement.
meaning.zh-Hant: 團結合作或達成共識。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ability to work together’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「人或事物能在沒有衝突的情況下共存或共同運作的能力」？

example.text: Check the software's compatibility with your phone before buying it.

translation.zh-Hant: 購買前，請確認這套軟體是否與你的手機相容。

meaning.en: The ability of people or things to exist or work together without conflict.
meaning.zh-Hant: 人或事物能在沒有衝突的情況下共存或共同運作的能力。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘deny access to something’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「拿走某人的東西，或不讓某人獲得某物」？

example.text: The outage could deprive the village of clean water.

translation.zh-Hant: 這次停電可能使村莊無法取得乾淨用水。

meaning.en: To take something away from someone or prevent them from having it.
meaning.zh-Hant: 拿走某人的東西，或不讓某人獲得某物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘completion deadline’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「任務預定必須完成的日期」？

example.text: The due date for the expense report is next Monday.

translation.zh-Hant: 費用報告的截止日期是下星期一。

meaning.en: The date by which a task is expected to be completed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 任務預定必須完成的日期。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘working day’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「人們通常需要工作的日子」？

example.text: Orders placed today will ship within one workday.

translation.zh-Hant: 今天下的訂單會在一個工作天內出貨。

meaning.en: A day on which people normally work.
meaning.zh-Hant: 人們通常需要工作的日子。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘barber's shop’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「理髮師替顧客剪髮與整理髮型的店」？

example.text: There is a traditional barbershop across from the hotel.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店對面有一間傳統理髮店。

meaning.en: A shop where a barber cuts and styles hair.
meaning.zh-Hant: 理髮師替顧客剪髮與整理髮型的店。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘shout aloud’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「大聲說出或宣布某事」？

example.text: Please call out my name when the doctor is ready.

translation.zh-Hant: 醫師準備好時，請大聲叫我的名字。

meaning.en: To say or announce something in a loud voice.
meaning.zh-Hant: 大聲說出或宣布某事。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘private-ownership economic system’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以私人所有權及運用資本獲利為基礎的經濟制度」？

example.text: The lecture examined how capitalism shapes consumer markets.

translation.zh-Hant: 這場講座探討資本主義如何塑造消費市場。

meaning.en: An economic system based on private ownership and the use of capital to earn profit.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以私人所有權及運用資本獲利為基礎的經濟制度。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘secret anti-competitive cooperation’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「表面上相互競爭或對立的各方暗中合作」？

example.text: Regulators found evidence of collusion between the two suppliers.

translation.zh-Hant: 主管機關發現兩家供應商之間有串通的證據。

meaning.en: Secret cooperation between parties that publicly appear to compete or oppose one another.
meaning.zh-Hant: 表面上相互競爭或對立的各方暗中合作。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘finishing something’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「成功完成某事的行為或狀態」？

example.text: Payment is due upon completion of the repair work.

translation.zh-Hant: 維修工作完成後即須付款。

meaning.en: The act or state of finishing something successfully.
meaning.zh-Hant: 成功完成某事的行為或狀態。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘expressing congratulations’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「對某人的成功表達稱讚與祝福的」？

example.text: The manager sent a congratulatory email to the sales team.

translation.zh-Hant: 經理寄了一封祝賀郵件給業務團隊。

meaning.en: Expressing praise and good wishes for someone's success.
meaning.zh-Hant: 對某人的成功表達稱讚與祝福的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘secret harmful plot’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「多人暗中協議從事有害、非法或顛覆性行動」？

example.text: Investigators uncovered a conspiracy to steal customer data.

translation.zh-Hant: 調查人員揭發了一起竊取顧客資料的陰謀。

meaning.en: A secret agreement between people to do something harmful, illegal, or subversive.
meaning.zh-Hant: 多人暗中協議從事有害、非法或顛覆性行動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘voluntary contribution’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「自願提供以支持某項事業的金錢、物品或協助」？

example.text: Your donation will help provide meals for local families.

translation.zh-Hant: 你的捐款將協助提供餐點給本地家庭。

meaning.en: Money, goods, or help given voluntarily to support a cause.
meaning.zh-Hant: 自願提供以支持某項事業的金錢、物品或協助。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘education professional’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以教學與教育為專業或工作的人」？

example.text: The workshop gives every educator practical classroom tools.

translation.zh-Hant: 這場工作坊為每位教育工作者提供實用的課堂工具。

meaning.en: A person whose profession or work involves teaching and education.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以教學與教育為專業或工作的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘company headquarters’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「公司或組織的主要行政中心」？

example.text: All regional budgets must be approved by the head office.

translation.zh-Hant: 所有區域預算都必須由總公司核准。

meaning.en: The main administrative center of a company or organization.
meaning.zh-Hant: 公司或組織的主要行政中心。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person refusing agreement’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「拒絕接受協議、通常希望爭取更好條件的人」？

example.text: The final holdout accepted the revised contract terms.

translation.zh-Hant: 最後一位拒絕妥協的人接受了修訂後的合約條件。

meaning.en: A person who refuses to accept an agreement, often while hoping for better terms.
meaning.zh-Hant: 拒絕接受協議、通常希望爭取更好條件的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘unable to do something’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「無法做成或達成某事的」？

example.text: This printer is incapable of producing color pages.

translation.zh-Hant: 這台印表機無法列印彩色頁面。

meaning.en: Unable to do or achieve something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 無法做成或達成某事的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘formal agreement’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「人、組織或國家之間的正式協議」？

example.text: The two companies signed a pact to share research costs.

translation.zh-Hant: 兩家公司簽署協議，共同分擔研究成本。

meaning.en: A formal agreement between people, organizations, or countries.
meaning.zh-Hant: 人、組織或國家之間的正式協議。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who receives something’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「收到某物的人，也就是接收者」？

example.text: The receiver must sign for the package at the door.

translation.zh-Hant: 收件人必須在門口簽收包裹。

meaning.en: A person who receives something; a recipient.
meaning.zh-Hant: 收到某物的人，也就是接收者。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘converting securities into cash’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將證券或投資轉換成現金」？

example.text: The fund charges a small fee at the time of redemption.

translation.zh-Hant: 這檔基金在贖回時會收取少量費用。

meaning.en: The conversion of a security or investment into cash.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將證券或投資轉換成現金。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘range of available skills’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個人可以運用的技能、能力與經驗範圍」？

example.text: Negotiation is an important skill in her professional repertoire.

translation.zh-Hant: 談判是她專業能力中一項重要技能。

meaning.en: The range of skills, abilities, and experience a person can draw on.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個人可以運用的技能、能力與經驗範圍。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘day off’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「暫停工作或其他例行活動、專門用來休息的一天」？

example.text: Friday is our rest day during the week-long cycling trip.

translation.zh-Hant: 在這趟一週的單車旅行中，星期五是我們的休息日。

meaning.en: A day set aside for resting from work or other regular activity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 暫停工作或其他例行活動、專門用來休息的一天。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘coercive penalty’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為迫使對方遵守規定而施加的處罰或強制措施」？

example.text: The regulator imposed a sanction after the company broke the rules.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司違規後，主管機關對其施加了制裁。

meaning.en: A penalty or coercive measure imposed to enforce compliance.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為迫使對方遵守規定而施加的處罰或強制措施。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘expedited courier service’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「支付額外費用後快速送達郵件或包裹的郵遞服務」？

example.text: We chose special delivery so the documents will arrive tomorrow.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們選擇快遞服務，讓文件能在明天送達。

meaning.en: A postal service that delivers an item quickly for an additional fee.
meaning.zh-Hant: 支付額外費用後快速送達郵件或包裹的郵遞服務。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘provider of goods’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「提供商品或服務的個人或公司」？

example.text: Our supplier confirmed that the parts will arrive on Tuesday.

translation.zh-Hant: 供應商確認零件會在星期二送達。

meaning.en: A person or company that provides goods or services.
meaning.zh-Hant: 提供商品或服務的個人或公司。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ticket booth’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「販售入場券或交通票券的窗口或櫃台」？

example.text: Show your passport at the ticket window to collect your rail pass.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在售票窗口出示護照，以領取鐵路周遊券。

meaning.en: A booth or counter where admission or travel tickets are sold.
meaning.zh-Hant: 販售入場券或交通票券的窗口或櫃台。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘timing device’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來計時，或在設定時間結束時發出提示的裝置」？

example.text: Set the timer for twenty minutes while the rice cooks.

translation.zh-Hant: 煮飯時請把計時器設定為二十分鐘。

meaning.en: A device used to measure time or signal when a set period has passed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來計時，或在設定時間結束時發出提示的裝置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘special court’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由一名或多名法官組成、裁決法律爭議的法院或正式機構」？

example.text: The employment tribunal will hear the worker's complaint next month.

translation.zh-Hant: 勞動法庭將在下個月審理這名員工的申訴。

meaning.en: A court or official body of one or more judges that decides legal disputes.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由一名或多名法官組成、裁決法律爭議的法院或正式機構。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘product repair guarantee’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「保證產品在特定期限與條件下可獲維修或更換的書面承諾」？

example.text: Keep the receipt in case you need to use the warranty.

translation.zh-Hant: 請保留收據，以防之後需要使用保固。

meaning.en: A written guarantee that a product will be repaired or replaced under stated conditions for a set period.
meaning.zh-Hant: 保證產品在特定期限與條件下可獲維修或更換的書面承諾。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘security rounds’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為守衛某區域而定期巡視，或執行這項任務的人員」？

example.text: A night patrol checks the warehouse every two hours.

translation.zh-Hant: 夜間巡邏人員每兩小時檢查一次倉庫。

meaning.en: A regular journey around an area to guard it, or the people performing that duty.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為守衛某區域而定期巡視，或執行這項任務的人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘professional adviser’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在特定領域提供專業建議或服務的專家」？

example.text: The company hired a consultant to improve its supply chain.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司聘請顧問來改善供應鏈。

meaning.en: A professional who provides expert advice or services in a particular field.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在特定領域提供專業建議或服務的專家。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘motivating reward’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為鼓勵特定行動而提供的事物」？

example.text: The bonus gives employees an incentive to reach the sales target.

translation.zh-Hant: 這筆獎金能激勵員工達成業績目標。

meaning.en: Something offered or provided to encourage a particular action.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為鼓勵特定行動而提供的事物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘organization staff’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「受僱於或服務於某個組織的人員」？

example.text: Only authorized personnel may enter the storage area.

translation.zh-Hant: 只有經授權的人員可以進入儲藏區。

meaning.en: The people employed by or serving in an organization.
meaning.zh-Hant: 受僱於或服務於某個組織的人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘sturdy work table’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用於木工、修繕或其他手工作業的堅固工作桌」？

example.text: The mechanic arranged the tools neatly on the workbench.

translation.zh-Hant: 技師把工具整齊地放在工作台上。

meaning.en: A strong table used for carpentry, repairs, or other manual work.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用於木工、修繕或其他手工作業的堅固工作桌。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who oversees work’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「正式負責監督他人工作或某項作業的人」？

example.text: Ask your supervisor before changing the delivery schedule.

translation.zh-Hant: 更改配送時程前，請先詢問你的主管。

meaning.en: A person officially responsible for overseeing other people's work or an operation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 正式負責監督他人工作或某項作業的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘business records clerk’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「記錄並維護企業財務交易資料的人」？

example.text: The bookkeeper reviews every invoice before issuing payment.

translation.zh-Hant: 記帳人員會在付款前審查每張發票。

meaning.en: A person who records and maintains a business's financial transactions.
meaning.zh-Hant: 記錄並維護企業財務交易資料的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘paying to influence an official’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為了影響公職人員的決策而提供非法款項的行為」？

example.text: The company introduced strict controls to prevent bribery.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司導入嚴格管控措施，以防止賄賂。

meaning.en: The act of offering an illegal payment to influence an official decision.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為了影響公職人員的決策而提供非法款項的行為。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘possible unexpected event’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「可能意外發生的事件或支出」？

example.text: The project budget includes extra funds for any contingency.

translation.zh-Hant: 專案預算包含額外資金，以應付任何突發狀況。

meaning.en: A possible event or expense that may occur unexpectedly.
meaning.zh-Hant: 可能意外發生的事件或支出。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘postpone until later’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「把某事延後到較晚的時間」？

example.text: We agreed to defer the final decision until more data arrives.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們同意等更多資料送達後再作最後決定。

meaning.en: To delay or postpone something until a later time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 把某事延後到較晚的時間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘middle party in a transaction’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在交易、協議或供應鏈各方之間居中協調的個人或組織」？

example.text: The exporter used a local intermediary to negotiate with retailers.

translation.zh-Hant: 出口商透過當地中介與零售商協商。

meaning.en: A person or organization positioned between parties in a transaction, agreement, or supply chain.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在交易、協議或供應鏈各方之間居中協調的個人或組織。

plainExpression: ability to last a long time

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘ability to last a long time’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「能長久持續或存活的特性」？

example.text: Regular maintenance can improve the longevity of the equipment.

translation.zh-Hant: 定期保養可以延長設備的使用壽命。

meaning.en: The quality of lasting or living for a long time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 能長久持續或存活的特性。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a system of working methods’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「特定領域或專案所採用的一套方法與程序」？

example.text: The research team explained its methodology before presenting the results.

translation.zh-Hant: 研究團隊在發表結果前，先說明了所採用的方法。

meaning.en: The set of methods and procedures used in a particular field or project.
meaning.zh-Hant: 特定領域或專案所採用的一套方法與程序。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an intermediary between parties’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在兩方或多方之間擔任中介的個人或企業」？

example.text: We bought directly from the farmer instead of using a middleman.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們沒有透過中間商，而是直接向農民購買。

meaning.en: A person or business that acts as an intermediary between two or more parties.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在兩方或多方之間擔任中介的個人或企業。

plainExpression: to present copied work as your own

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘to present copied work as your own’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「使用他人的文字、想法或創作，並冒充為自己的作品」？

example.text: Students who plagiarize material from websites may fail the course.

translation.zh-Hant: 抄襲網站內容的學生可能會被判定該課程不及格。

meaning.en: To use another person's words, ideas, or creative work and present them as one's own.
meaning.zh-Hant: 使用他人的文字、想法或創作，並冒充為自己的作品。

plainExpression: a person new to an activity

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person new to an activity’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「剛進入某項工作、運動或活動而經驗不多的人」？

example.text: The rookie salesperson asked a senior colleague for advice.

translation.zh-Hant: 那位業務新人向資深同事請教。

meaning.en: A person who is new to a job, sport, or other activity and has little experience.
meaning.zh-Hant: 剛進入某項工作、運動或活動而經驗不多的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a set of connected rooms’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一組相連並供人一起使用的房間，尤其指飯店套房」？

example.text: The hotel upgraded our family to a suite with a separate living room.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店把我們全家升等到附有獨立客廳的套房。

meaning.en: A group of connected rooms designed to be used together, especially in a hotel.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一組相連並供人一起使用的房間，尤其指飯店套房。

plainExpression: the place that sells event tickets

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the place that sells event tickets’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「劇院或電影院中販售票券的地方」？

example.text: We collected our concert tickets at the box office before the show.

translation.zh-Hant: 表演開始前，我們到售票處領取演唱會門票。

meaning.en: A place at a theater or cinema where tickets are sold.
meaning.zh-Hant: 劇院或電影院中販售票券的地方。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an electric lamp’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「內有金屬燈絲的密封玻璃燈泡，通電加熱後會發光」？

example.text: The light bulb above the kitchen table burned out last night.

translation.zh-Hant: 廚房餐桌上方的燈泡昨晚燒壞了。

meaning.en: A sealed glass bulb containing a metal filament that produces light when heated by electricity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 內有金屬燈絲的密封玻璃燈泡，通電加熱後會發光。

plainExpression: a person paid to drive a bus

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person paid to drive a bus’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「受雇駕駛公車，沿路線載送乘客的人」？

example.text: The bus driver waited until the elderly passenger was seated.

translation.zh-Hant: 公車司機等到那位年長乘客坐好後才開車。

meaning.en: A person employed to drive a bus and carry passengers along a route.
meaning.zh-Hant: 受雇駕駛公車，沿路線載送乘客的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a machine that washes dishes’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「自動清洗碗盤、杯子與餐具的機器」？

example.text: Please load the plates into the dishwasher after dinner.

translation.zh-Hant: 晚餐後請把盤子放進洗碗機。

meaning.en: A machine that automatically washes dishes, cups, and eating utensils.
meaning.zh-Hant: 自動清洗碗盤、杯子與餐具的機器。

plainExpression: an airline crew member who assists passengers

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an airline crew member who assists passengers’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「飛行期間負責乘客安全與舒適的航空機組人員」？

example.text: The flight attendant demonstrated how to fasten the seat belt.

translation.zh-Hant: 空服員示範了如何繫好安全帶。

meaning.en: An airline crew member responsible for passenger safety and comfort during a flight.
meaning.zh-Hant: 飛行期間負責乘客安全與舒適的航空機組人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘to go past without stopping’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「經過某人或某地而不停下來」？

example.text: Several trains pass by this platform without stopping.

translation.zh-Hant: 有好幾班火車會經過這座月台，但不會停靠。

meaning.en: To travel past a person or place without stopping.
meaning.zh-Hant: 經過某人或某地而不停下來。

plainExpression: the reference height of the ocean surface

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the reference height of the ocean surface’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來測量海拔高度的標準海面高度」？

example.text: This mountain village lies two thousand meters above sea level.

translation.zh-Hant: 這座山村位於海拔兩千公尺處。

meaning.en: The standard height of the ocean surface used as a reference for measuring elevation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來測量海拔高度的標準海面高度。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a vehicle that can fly’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「設計用來在空中飛行的交通工具，例如飛機或直升機」？

example.text: Ground crews inspected the aircraft before passengers boarded.

translation.zh-Hant: 乘客登機前，地勤人員檢查了這架航空器。

meaning.en: A vehicle designed to fly through the air, such as an airplane or helicopter.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設計用來在空中飛行的交通工具，例如飛機或直升機。

plainExpression: a seat next to the aisle

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a seat next to the aisle’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「公車、火車或客機上靠走道的座位」？

example.text: I requested an aisle seat so I could stand up easily during the flight.

translation.zh-Hant: 我要求走道座位，以便在飛行途中能輕鬆起身。

meaning.en: A seat beside the aisle on a bus, train, or passenger aircraft.
meaning.zh-Hant: 公車、火車或客機上靠走道的座位。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘shared lodging for travelers’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為旅客提供過夜住宿的地方，通常有共用房間與設施」？

example.text: The hostel has lockers for backpacks and a shared kitchen downstairs.

translation.zh-Hant: 這間青年旅館設有背包置物櫃，樓下還有共用廚房。

meaning.en: A place that offers travelers overnight lodging, usually with shared rooms and facilities.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為旅客提供過夜住宿的地方，通常有共用房間與設施。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a trained rescuer for swimmers’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「受過訓練並受雇看守游泳者、救援水中遇險者的人」？

example.text: The lifeguard closed the beach when the waves became dangerous.

translation.zh-Hant: 海浪變得危險時，救生員關閉了海灘。

meaning.en: A trained person employed to watch swimmers and rescue anyone in danger in the water.
meaning.zh-Hant: 受過訓練並受雇看守游泳者、救援水中遇險者的人。

plainExpression: a roadside hotel with nearby parking

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a roadside hotel with nearby parking’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常位於道路旁，客房可方便通往停車區的住宿場所」？

example.text: We stopped at a motel beside the highway after driving all day.

translation.zh-Hant: 開了一整天的車後，我們在高速公路旁的汽車旅館過夜。

meaning.en: A roadside lodging place whose rooms usually have convenient access to a parking area.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常位於道路旁，客房可方便通往停車區的住宿場所。

plainExpression: a ticket for going and coming back

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a ticket for going and coming back’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「包含前往目的地及返回行程的來回票」？

example.text: I bought a return ticket from Taipei to Hualien for the weekend.

translation.zh-Hant: 我買了一張週末從臺北到花蓮的來回票。

meaning.en: A ticket that covers both a journey to a destination and the journey back.
meaning.zh-Hant: 包含前往目的地及返回行程的來回票。

plainExpression: the price of travel by plane

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the price of travel by plane’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「乘客搭乘飛機所需支付的費用」？

example.text: Airfare usually rises during long holiday weekends.

translation.zh-Hant: 連續假期期間，機票價格通常會上漲。

meaning.en: The amount charged for a passenger to travel by airplane.
meaning.zh-Hant: 乘客搭乘飛機所需支付的費用。

plainExpression: a call telling passengers to board

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a call telling passengers to board’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「提醒乘客登上即將出發的火車或船隻的呼喊」？

example.text: The conductor called "all aboard" just before the train doors closed.

translation.zh-Hant: 火車門關上前，列車長高喊「請全體乘客上車」。

meaning.en: A call telling passengers to get on a train or boat that is about to leave.
meaning.zh-Hant: 提醒乘客登上即將出發的火車或船隻的呼喊。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a document required for boarding’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「允許乘客登上飛機或其他交通工具的文件」？

example.text: She showed her boarding pass at the gate and joined the line.

translation.zh-Hant: 她在登機門出示登機證後排進隊伍。

meaning.en: A document that allows a passenger to board an airplane or another form of transport.
meaning.zh-Hant: 允許乘客登上飛機或其他交通工具的文件。

plainExpression: an outdoor fire at a campsite

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an outdoor fire at a campsite’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在營地生起，用來取暖、照明、煮食或圍坐的火」？

example.text: We roasted corn over the campfire after sunset.

translation.zh-Hant: 日落後，我們在營火上烤玉米。

meaning.en: A fire made at a campsite for warmth, light, cooking, or gathering around.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在營地生起，用來取暖、照明、煮食或圍坐的火。

plainExpression: a casual place that serves food

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a casual place that serves food’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供人購買並享用餐點的餐廳、咖啡館或其他場所」？

example.text: A small eatery near the station serves excellent noodles.

translation.zh-Hant: 車站附近有間小餐館，賣的麵非常好吃。

meaning.en: A restaurant, café, or other place where people can buy and eat food.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供人購買並享用餐點的餐廳、咖啡館或其他場所。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an educational visit outside class’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為教育、研究或探索而進行的團體旅行，尤其常由學生參加」？

example.text: Our science class took a field trip to a coastal research center.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們的自然課到海岸研究中心進行校外教學。

meaning.en: A group trip made for education, research, or exploration, especially by students.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為教育、研究或探索而進行的團體旅行，尤其常由學生參加。

plainExpression: a building for firefighters and fire engines

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a building for firefighters and fire engines’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「消防員與消防車未出勤時駐守的建築物」？

example.text: The children toured the fire station and climbed into a fire engine.

translation.zh-Hant: 孩子們參觀消防分隊，還坐進了一輛消防車。

meaning.en: A building where firefighters and fire engines are based when not responding to emergencies.
meaning.zh-Hant: 消防員與消防車未出勤時駐守的建築物。

plainExpression: a room reserved for visiting guests

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a room reserved for visiting guests’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「住家或飯店中保留給訪客或短期住宿者使用的房間」？

example.text: We prepared the guest room before my aunt arrived for the weekend.

translation.zh-Hant: 阿姨週末到訪前，我們整理好了客房。

meaning.en: A room in a home or hotel set aside for people who are visiting or staying temporarily.
meaning.zh-Hant: 住家或飯店中保留給訪客或短期住宿者使用的房間。

plainExpression: border checks for entering a country

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘border checks for entering a country’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在邊境檢查站入境時接受旅行證件查驗的程序」？

example.text: It took nearly an hour to clear immigration after our flight landed.

translation.zh-Hant: 班機降落後，我們花了將近一小時才完成入境查驗。

meaning.en: The process of having travel documents checked when entering a country at a border checkpoint.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在邊境檢查站入境時接受旅行證件查驗的程序。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘tiredness after crossing time zones’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「搭機跨越時區後，睡眠與精神狀態受到干擾的身體不適」？

example.text: The jet lag kept me awake until three in the morning.

translation.zh-Hant: 時差讓我一直清醒到凌晨三點。

meaning.en: A physical condition in which sleep and energy are disrupted after flying across time zones.
meaning.zh-Hant: 搭機跨越時區後，睡眠與精神狀態受到干擾的身體不適。

plainExpression: the official time in a place

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the official time in a place’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「特定地區或時區所採用的官方時間」？

example.text: Our flight is scheduled to land at 7:30 p.m. local time.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們的班機預定於當地時間晚上七點半降落。

meaning.en: The official time used in a particular region or time zone.
meaning.zh-Hant: 特定地區或時區所採用的官方時間。

plainExpression: a small bus for a group

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a small bus for a group’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來載送人數較少團體的小型巴士」？

example.text: The hotel arranged a minibus to take us to the airport.

translation.zh-Hant: 飯店安排了一輛小巴送我們去機場。

meaning.en: A small bus used to transport a relatively small group of people.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來載送人數較少團體的小型巴士。

plainExpression: a trip to observe wild animals

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a trip to observe wild animals’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「前往野外地區，在自然環境中觀察、拍攝，有時狩獵動物的旅行」？

example.text: Our safari guide spotted elephants near the river at dawn.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們的嚮導在野生動物觀察行程中，於黎明時發現河邊有大象。

meaning.en: A trip into a wild area to see, photograph, or sometimes hunt animals in their natural environment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 前往野外地區，在自然環境中觀察、拍攝，有時狩獵動物的旅行。

plainExpression: waiting for an available flight seat

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘waiting for an available flight seat’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在機場等候，希望已客滿的航班臨時有座位空出」？

example.text: The standby passengers stayed near the gate until boarding ended.

translation.zh-Hant: 候補乘客一直待在登機門附近，直到登機結束。

meaning.en: Waiting at an airport in the hope that a seat becomes available on a fully booked flight.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在機場等候，希望已客滿的航班臨時有座位空出。

plainExpression: a car that carries paying passengers

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a car that carries paying passengers’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由司機駕駛並收費載送乘客前往指定地點的汽車」？

example.text: We hailed a taxicab outside the station because it was raining.

translation.zh-Hant: 因為下雨，我們在車站外攔了一輛計程車。

meaning.en: A car with a driver who takes passengers to requested destinations for payment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由司機駕駛並收費載送乘客前往指定地點的汽車。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘permission to travel by train’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「允許持票者搭乘火車，通常往返於指定車站之間的票券」？

example.text: Keep your train ticket until you leave the destination station.

translation.zh-Hant: 離開目的地車站前，請保留火車票。

meaning.en: A ticket that allows its holder to travel by train, usually between specified stations.
meaning.zh-Hant: 允許持票者搭乘火車，通常往返於指定車站之間的票券。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a professional who arranges trips’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為客戶安排交通、住宿及其他旅行服務的顧問」？

example.text: The travel agent found us a hotel close to the convention center.

translation.zh-Hant: 旅行社人員替我們找到一間靠近會展中心的飯店。

meaning.en: A consultant who arranges transportation, accommodation, and other travel services for clients.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為客戶安排交通、住宿及其他旅行服務的顧問。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a seat beside a window’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「公車、火車或客機上靠窗的座位」？

example.text: My daughter chose a window seat so she could watch the clouds.

translation.zh-Hant: 女兒選了靠窗座位，這樣就能看雲。

meaning.en: A seat next to a window on a bus, train, or passenger aircraft.
meaning.zh-Hant: 公車、火車或客機上靠窗的座位。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an available room for guests’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「飯店或旅館中可供房客租用的空房」？

example.text: The clerk said there was only one vacancy left that night.

translation.zh-Hant: 櫃檯人員說當晚只剩一間空房。

meaning.en: A room that is available for a guest to rent in a hotel or guesthouse.
meaning.zh-Hant: 飯店或旅館中可供房客租用的空房。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a traveler carrying a backpack’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以背包攜帶行李，且常使用平價交通與住宿的旅客」？

example.text: The backpacker compared hostel prices before arriving in Kyoto.

translation.zh-Hant: 那位背包客抵達京都前比較了各家青年旅館的價格。

meaning.en: A traveler who carries luggage in a backpack and often uses inexpensive transport and lodging.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以背包攜帶行李，且常使用平價交通與住宿的旅客。

plainExpression: the process of reporting your arrival

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the process of reporting your arrival’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「抵達飯店或機場後報到並完成必要手續的程序」？

example.text: Online check-in opens twenty-four hours before departure.

translation.zh-Hant: 線上報到會在出發前二十四小時開放。

meaning.en: The act of reporting one's arrival at a hotel or airport and completing the required procedures.
meaning.zh-Hant: 抵達飯店或機場後報到並完成必要手續的程序。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a short trip for pleasure’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為了休閒而進行的短途旅行或郊遊」？

example.text: The office planned a weekend outing to a nearby farm.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司規劃了週末到附近農場的郊遊。

meaning.en: A short trip or excursion taken for enjoyment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為了休閒而進行的短途旅行或郊遊。

plainExpression: an arrangement to share a car

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an arrangement to share a car’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「數人共乘一輛車，以節省費用或減少污染的安排」？

example.text: Four neighbors formed a carpool for the daily commute.

translation.zh-Hant: 四位鄰居組成共乘小組，方便每天通勤。

meaning.en: An arrangement in which several people travel together in one car to save money or reduce pollution.
meaning.zh-Hant: 數人共乘一輛車，以節省費用或減少污染的安排。

plainExpression: a place where aircraft take off and land

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a place where aircraft take off and land’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「指定供航空器起降的開放區域，設施通常比機場少」？

example.text: The rescue helicopter returned to the airfield before dark.

translation.zh-Hant: 救援直升機在天黑前返回了飛行場。

meaning.en: An open area designated for aircraft to take off and land, often with fewer facilities than an airport.
meaning.zh-Hant: 指定供航空器起降的開放區域，設施通常比機場少。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a room for storing coats’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「劇院或類似場所中，供訪客寄放外套等衣物的房間」？

example.text: We left our wet umbrellas and coats in the cloakroom.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們把淋濕的雨傘和外套寄放在衣帽間。

meaning.en: A room at a theater or similar venue where guests can leave coats and other outerwear.
meaning.zh-Hant: 劇院或類似場所中，供訪客寄放外套等衣物的房間。

plainExpression: a front light on a vehicle

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a front light on a vehicle’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「裝在車輛前方、夜間用來照亮道路的明亮車燈」？

example.text: One headlight was broken, so the driver took the car for repairs.

translation.zh-Hant: 有一盞頭燈壞了，因此駕駛把車送去維修。

meaning.en: A bright light on the front of a vehicle that illuminates the road at night.
meaning.zh-Hant: 裝在車輛前方、夜間用來照亮道路的明亮車燈。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a platform extending over water’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「從岸邊延伸到水面上的高架平台，可供人上下船隻」？

example.text: Fishing boats were tied to the pier before the storm arrived.

translation.zh-Hant: 暴風雨來臨前，漁船都繫在碼頭邊。

meaning.en: A raised platform extending from the shore over water, used for access to boats or ships.
meaning.zh-Hant: 從岸邊延伸到水面上的高架平台，可供人上下船隻。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a surface for road travel’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供車輛作為道路使用的路線或路面」？

example.text: Workers cleared fallen branches from the roadway after the storm.

translation.zh-Hant: 暴風雨過後，工人清除了道路上的斷枝。

meaning.en: A way or surface intended to be used as a road.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供車輛作為道路使用的路線或路面。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a boat powered by sails’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「主要靠風力吹動船帆前進的船」？

example.text: A small sailboat crossed the bay in the afternoon breeze.

translation.zh-Hant: 一艘小帆船乘著午後微風穿過海灣。

meaning.en: A boat that is moved mainly by wind acting on its sails.
meaning.zh-Hant: 主要靠風力吹動船帆前進的船。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a set of stairs’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「連接建築物不同樓層的一整段樓梯」？

example.text: The old wooden staircase creaked as we climbed to the attic.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們走上閣樓時，那座老木樓梯嘎吱作響。

meaning.en: A flight of stairs that connects one level of a building to another.
meaning.zh-Hant: 連接建築物不同樓層的一整段樓梯。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the lowest-priced seating class’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「飛機或某些大眾運輸工具中等級最低的乘客座位」？

example.text: Meals are included with every economy class ticket on this route.

translation.zh-Hant: 這條航線的每張經濟艙機票都包含餐點。

meaning.en: The lowest tier of passenger seating on an airplane or some other forms of public transport.
meaning.zh-Hant: 飛機或某些大眾運輸工具中等級最低的乘客座位。

plainExpression: a break between parts of a journey

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a break between parts of a journey’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「旅程兩個階段之間的停留，尤其指轉機等待時間」？

example.text: We have a three-hour layover in Seoul before the next flight.

translation.zh-Hant: 搭下一班飛機前，我們會在首爾轉機停留三小時。

meaning.en: A break between two stages of a journey, especially between connecting flights.
meaning.zh-Hant: 旅程兩個階段之間的停留，尤其指轉機等待時間。

plainExpression: a failure to appear as scheduled

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a failure to appear as scheduled’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「未依約出席預定會面、訂位或活動的情況」？

example.text: The missed appointment was recorded as a no-show.

translation.zh-Hant: 這次未依約出席的預約被記錄為缺席。

meaning.en: A failure to appear for a scheduled appointment, booking, or event.
meaning.zh-Hant: 未依約出席預定會面、訂位或活動的情況。

plainExpression: an immune reaction to a substance

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an immune reaction to a substance’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「免疫系統對多數人無害的物質產生不良反應的疾病」？

example.text: Please tell the server that I have an allergy to sesame.

translation.zh-Hant: 請告訴服務人員我對芝麻過敏。

meaning.en: An immune-system disorder that causes an adverse reaction to a substance that is harmless to most people.
meaning.zh-Hant: 免疫系統對多數人無害的物質產生不良反應的疾病。

plainExpression: the edible stalks of a plant

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the edible stalks of a plant’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「芹菜植物可作為蔬菜食用的爽脆莖部」？

example.text: She chopped celery and carrots for the soup.

translation.zh-Hant: 她切了芹菜和胡蘿蔔來煮湯。

meaning.en: The crisp stalks of the celery plant, eaten as a vegetable.
meaning.zh-Hant: 芹菜植物可作為蔬菜食用的爽脆莖部。

plainExpression: frequent loose or watery bowel movements

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘frequent loose or watery bowel movements’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「會頻繁排出稀便或水便的消化系統疾病」？

example.text: The traveler developed diarrhea and went to a clinic for help.

translation.zh-Hant: 那位旅客出現腹瀉，因此到診所求助。

meaning.en: A digestive disorder involving frequent loose or watery bowel movements.
meaning.zh-Hant: 會頻繁排出稀便或水便的消化系統疾病。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person who gives something’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為了幫助他人或公益目的而捐出金錢、血液、器官或其他物品的人」？

example.text: Each blood donor received a message when the donation was used.

translation.zh-Hant: 每位捐血者都會在血液被使用時收到通知。

meaning.en: A person who gives money, blood, an organ, or something else to help another person or cause.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為了幫助他人或公益目的而捐出金錢、血液、器官或其他物品的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘illness caused by contaminated food’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因食物受污染而引起的疾病，常造成噁心、嘔吐、腹瀉或腹痛」？

example.text: Several guests suspected food poisoning after the banquet.

translation.zh-Hant: 宴會後有幾位賓客懷疑自己食物中毒。

meaning.en: An illness caused by contaminated food, often producing nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, or stomach pain.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因食物受污染而引起的疾病，常造成噁心、嘔吐、腹瀉或腹痛。

plainExpression: a shared meal cooked in simmering broth

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a shared meal cooked in simmering broth’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「大家圍桌將肉類、蔬菜等食材放入熱湯中煮熟共食的餐點」？

example.text: We ordered a spicy hot pot and added the vegetables first.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們點了麻辣火鍋，先把蔬菜放進鍋裡。

meaning.en: A communal meal in which diners cook meat, vegetables, and other ingredients in hot broth at the table.
meaning.zh-Hant: 大家圍桌將肉類、蔬菜等食材放入熱湯中煮熟共食的餐點。

plainExpression: a paved outdoor area beside a house

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a paved outdoor area beside a house’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「緊鄰房屋、供用餐或休閒使用的鋪面戶外空間」？

example.text: We ate breakfast on the patio while the weather was cool.

translation.zh-Hant: 天氣涼爽時，我們在露臺上吃早餐。

meaning.en: A paved outdoor area next to a house, used for dining or relaxation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 緊鄰房屋、供用餐或休閒使用的鋪面戶外空間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a place that dispenses medicine’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「調配、交付並販售處方藥物的場所」？

example.text: The pharmacy across from the hospital stays open all night.

translation.zh-Hant: 醫院對面的藥局整晚營業。

meaning.en: A place where prescription medicines are prepared, dispensed, and sold.
meaning.zh-Hant: 調配、交付並販售處方藥物的場所。

plainExpression: a person who runs a retail shop

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person who runs a retail shop’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「擁有或經營商店並向顧客販售商品的人」？

example.text: The shopkeeper restocked the shelves before opening the store.

translation.zh-Hant: 店主在開門營業前補滿了貨架。

meaning.en: A person who owns or manages a shop and sells goods to customers.
meaning.zh-Hant: 擁有或經營商店並向顧客販售商品的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a building for storing goods’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「商品或產品在販售或配送前用來存放的大型建築物」？

example.text: The shipment arrived at the warehouse early this morning.

translation.zh-Hant: 這批貨今天一早抵達倉庫。

meaning.en: A large building used to store merchandise or products before they are sold or distributed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 商品或產品在販售或配送前用來存放的大型建築物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a road with no exit’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一端封閉或無法通行的街道、小徑或隧道」？

example.text: The delivery truck had to reverse after reaching a dead end.

translation.zh-Hant: 送貨卡車開到死路後，只好倒車離開。

meaning.en: A street, path, or tunnel that is blocked or has no way through at one end.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一端封閉或無法通行的街道、小徑或隧道。

plainExpression: the process of breaking down food

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the process of breaking down food’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「消化系統將食物轉化為身體可利用物質的過程」？

example.text: A short walk after dinner may help digestion.

translation.zh-Hant: 晚餐後散步一會兒可能有助於消化。

meaning.en: The process in the digestive system that turns food into substances the body can use.
meaning.zh-Hant: 消化系統將食物轉化為身體可利用物質的過程。

plainExpression: a member of the human species

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a member of the human species’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「人；智人這個物種的一員」？

example.text: Every human being needs access to clean water.

translation.zh-Hant: 每個人都需要取得乾淨的水。

meaning.en: A person; a member of the species Homo sapiens.
meaning.zh-Hant: 人；智人這個物種的一員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘food with little nutritional value’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「營養價值低，或含有過多熱量、糖、脂肪或鹽的食物」？

example.text: The coach advised the players to eat less junk food.

translation.zh-Hant: 教練建議球員少吃垃圾食物。

meaning.en: Food that has little nutritional value or contains excessive calories, sugar, fat, or salt.
meaning.zh-Hant: 營養價值低，或含有過多熱量、糖、脂肪或鹽的食物。

plainExpression: an appliance that heats food with microwaves

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an appliance that heats food with microwaves’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「利用微波能量加熱或烹調食物的家電」？

example.text: The office microwave oven is available for staff to heat lunch.

translation.zh-Hant: 辦公室的微波爐可供員工加熱午餐。

meaning.en: An appliance that uses microwave energy to heat or cook food.
meaning.zh-Hant: 利用微波能量加熱或烹調食物的家電。

plainExpression: a school for children before primary school

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a school for children before primary school’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供通常為三至五歲、尚未就讀小學的幼兒接受教育的機構」？

example.text: The nursery school holds an open house for parents each spring.

translation.zh-Hant: 這間幼兒園每年春天都會為家長舉辦開放日。

meaning.en: An educational institution for young children, usually ages three to five, before primary school.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供通常為三至五歲、尚未就讀小學的幼兒接受教育的機構。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an eight-armed marine mollusk’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「有八條布滿吸盤的腕，且沒有保護殼的海洋軟體動物」？

example.text: The octopus changed color and hid between the rocks.

translation.zh-Hant: 那隻章魚變了顏色，躲進岩石之間。

meaning.en: A marine mollusk with eight arms covered in suckers and no protective shell.
meaning.zh-Hant: 有八條布滿吸盤的腕，且沒有保護殼的海洋軟體動物。

plainExpression: a baked food made from flour and fat

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a baked food made from flour and fat’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以麵粉與油脂製成的麵團烘焙而成的食品，例如塔或酥皮點心」？

example.text: I chose an apple pastry from the bakery for breakfast.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在麵包店選了一個蘋果酥當早餐。

meaning.en: A baked food made from a dough rich in flour and fat, such as a tart or puff pastry.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以麵粉與油脂製成的麵團烘焙而成的食品，例如塔或酥皮點心。

plainExpression: to repay money that is owed

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘to repay money that is owed’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將積欠貸方或債權人的款項全數償還」？

example.text: I will pay back the money as soon as my salary arrives.

translation.zh-Hant: 薪水一入帳，我就會把錢還清。

meaning.en: To return the full amount of money owed to a lender or creditor.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將積欠貸方或債權人的款項全數償還。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘difficult to satisfy’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「非常講究且難以滿足，因為凡事都必須完全合意」？

example.text: My son is picky about vegetables but loves fruit.

translation.zh-Hant: 我兒子很挑蔬菜，卻很愛吃水果。

meaning.en: Very particular and difficult to satisfy because everything must seem exactly right.
meaning.zh-Hant: 非常講究且難以滿足，因為凡事都必須完全合意。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a penalty for unacceptable behavior’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「權威者針對不當行為所施加的懲罰」？

example.text: Losing screen time was the punishment for breaking the rule.

translation.zh-Hant: 因為違反規定，他受到的懲罰是不能使用三Ｃ產品。

meaning.en: A penalty imposed by a person in authority in response to unacceptable behavior.
meaning.zh-Hant: 權威者針對不當行為所施加的懲罰。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a school's academic year’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「學校上課並進行教學活動的一段年度期間」？

example.text: The new school year begins at the end of August.

translation.zh-Hant: 新學年在八月底開始。

meaning.en: The period of the year during which a school holds classes and academic activities.
meaning.zh-Hant: 學校上課並進行教學活動的一段年度期間。

plainExpression: a small edible seed used in cooking

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a small edible seed used in cooking’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「芝麻植物可食用的小種子，常用於烹調」？

example.text: The baker sprinkled sesame over the bread before baking it.

translation.zh-Hant: 麵包師傅在烘烤前把芝麻撒在麵包上。

meaning.en: The small edible seed of the sesame plant, often used in cooking.
meaning.zh-Hant: 芝麻植物可食用的小種子，常用於烹調。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a market for trading securities’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由專業經紀人買賣股票及其他證券的組織化市場」？

example.text: Shares of the company began trading on the stock exchange today.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家公司的股票今天開始在證券交易所交易。

meaning.en: An organized market where professional brokers buy and sell stocks and other securities.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由專業經紀人買賣股票及其他證券的組織化市場。

plainExpression: a thick sweet liquid used on food

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a thick sweet liquid used on food’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「淋在食物上或加入食物中調味的高糖濃稠液體」？

example.text: He poured maple syrup over the warm pancakes.

translation.zh-Hant: 他把楓糖漿淋在熱鬆餅上。

meaning.en: A thick, high-sugar liquid poured over or added to food for flavor.
meaning.zh-Hant: 淋在食物上或加入食物中調味的高糖濃稠液體。

plainExpression: a machine that removes dirt by suction

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a machine that removes dirt by suction’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「利用吸力清除地毯與硬質地板上灰塵和碎屑的設備」？

example.text: The vacuum cleaner picked up crumbs under the dining table.

translation.zh-Hant: 吸塵器吸走了餐桌下的食物碎屑。

meaning.en: A device that uses suction to remove dirt and debris from carpets and hard floors.
meaning.zh-Hant: 利用吸力清除地毯與硬質地板上灰塵和碎屑的設備。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a doctor who treats animals’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「診斷並治療動物疾病與傷勢的醫療專業人員」？

example.text: The veterinarian gave our cat medicine for its ear infection.

translation.zh-Hant: 獸醫開了藥，治療我們家貓咪的耳部感染。

meaning.en: A medical professional who diagnoses and treats illnesses and injuries in animals.
meaning.zh-Hant: 診斷並治療動物疾病與傷勢的醫療專業人員。

plainExpression: a paper or polymer form of money

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a paper or polymer form of money’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由紙或聚合物製成並發行作為貨幣使用的鈔票」？

example.text: The machine would not accept the damaged banknote.

translation.zh-Hant: 這臺機器不接受那張破損的鈔票。

meaning.en: A piece of currency made from paper or polymer and issued for use as money.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由紙或聚合物製成並發行作為貨幣使用的鈔票。

plainExpression: liquid made by boiling food in water

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘liquid made by boiling food in water’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將肉類、蔬菜或其他食物放入水中煮過後形成的湯汁」？

example.text: Add the noodles when the broth begins to boil.

translation.zh-Hant: 湯開始沸騰時，再把麵條放進去。

meaning.en: The liquid produced by boiling meat, vegetables, or other food in water.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將肉類、蔬菜或其他食物放入水中煮過後形成的湯汁。

plainExpression: a line used for drying clothes

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a line used for drying clothes’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「掛在戶外，供洗好的衣物吊掛晾乾的繩索」？

example.text: The shirts dried quickly on the clothesline in the sun.

translation.zh-Hant: 襯衫掛在曬衣繩上，很快就被太陽曬乾了。

meaning.en: A rope or cord hung outdoors so that washed clothes can be hung on it to dry.
meaning.zh-Hant: 掛在戶外，供洗好的衣物吊掛晾乾的繩索。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a mixed alcoholic drink’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將兩種以上材料混合調製而成的酒精飲料」？

example.text: The bartender mixed a citrus cocktail with gin and fresh lime.

translation.zh-Hant: 酒保用琴酒和新鮮萊姆調了一杯柑橘雞尾酒。

meaning.en: An alcoholic drink made by mixing two or more ingredients.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將兩種以上材料混合調製而成的酒精飲料。

plainExpression: a marked place for pedestrians to cross

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a marked place for pedestrians to cross’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「指定供行人穿越街道的地點」？

example.text: Wait for the signal before entering the crosswalk.

translation.zh-Hant: 進入行人穿越道前，請先等候號誌。

meaning.en: A designated place where pedestrians can cross a street.
meaning.zh-Hant: 指定供行人穿越街道的地點。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an exit for rapid evacuation’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「設計供人們在火災或其他緊急狀況下迅速離開建築物的出口」？

example.text: Do not place boxes in front of the emergency exit.

translation.zh-Hant: 請勿將紙箱放在緊急出口前。

meaning.en: An exit designed to let people leave a building quickly during a fire or other emergency.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設計供人們在火災或其他緊急狀況下迅速離開建築物的出口。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a gathering of separated relatives’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「平時住在不同地方的家人或親戚偶爾相聚的活動」？

example.text: Relatives traveled from three countries for the family reunion.

translation.zh-Hant: 親戚們從三個國家趕來參加家族團聚。

meaning.en: An occasional gathering of family members or relatives who usually live in different places.
meaning.zh-Hant: 平時住在不同地方的家人或親戚偶爾相聚的活動。

plainExpression: a device that warns of a fire

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a device that warns of a fire’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「警告建築物內的人可能發生火災或其他需要疏散之緊急狀況的裝置」？

example.text: The fire alarm sounded, and everyone left through the stairs.

translation.zh-Hant: 火災警報響起後，所有人都從樓梯離開。

meaning.en: A device that warns people in a building of a possible fire or another emergency requiring evacuation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 警告建築物內的人可能發生火災或其他需要疏散之緊急狀況的裝置。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘basic immediate medical care’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「傷者在獲得完整治療前立即接受的基本醫療照護」？

example.text: A coworker gave first aid to the man who cut his hand.

translation.zh-Hant: 一名同事替手部割傷的男子進行急救。

meaning.en: Basic medical care given immediately to someone who is injured before more complete treatment is available.
meaning.zh-Hant: 傷者在獲得完整治療前立即接受的基本醫療照護。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘being offered for rental’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「可供他人支付約定費用後租用」？

example.text: A sign in the window said the apartment was for rent.

translation.zh-Hant: 窗戶上的告示寫著這間公寓正在出租。

meaning.en: Available to be rented by someone for an agreed payment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 可供他人支付約定費用後租用。

plainExpression: to return something to its owner

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘to return something to its owner’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將某物歸還給原本的所有人或放回原處」？

example.text: Please give back the library book before Friday.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在星期五前歸還那本圖書館的書。

meaning.en: To return something to its original owner or place.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將某物歸還給原本的所有人或放回原處。

plainExpression: the physical parts of a computer

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the physical parts of a computer’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「電腦中必須更換或實際改裝才能變更的實體零組件」？

example.text: The technician replaced the damaged hardware inside the laptop.

translation.zh-Hant: 技術人員更換了筆電內損壞的硬體。

meaning.en: The physical parts of a computer that must be replaced or physically modified to be changed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 電腦中必須更換或實際改裝才能變更的實體零組件。

plainExpression: a person who invests for profit

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person who invests for profit’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為了獲利而將資金投入企業或資產的人」？

example.text: The investor reviewed the company's financial statements before buying shares.

translation.zh-Hant: 那位投資人在買進股票前查閱了公司的財務報表。

meaning.en: A person who puts money into a business or asset in order to earn a profit.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為了獲利而將資金投入企業或資產的人。

plainExpression: to begin living in a new place

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘to begin living in a new place’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「開始在新地點居住或工作，並將個人物品搬入」？

example.text: We can move in as soon as the landlord gives us the keys.

translation.zh-Hant: 房東把鑰匙交給我們後，我們就能搬進去。

meaning.en: To begin living or working in a new place and bring one's belongings there.
meaning.zh-Hant: 開始在新地點居住或工作，並將個人物品搬入。

plainExpression: a disposable sheet of absorbent paper

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a disposable sheet of absorbent paper’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常成捲供應，用於清潔或準備食物的吸水紙張」？

example.text: Use a paper towel to dry the vegetables after washing them.

translation.zh-Hant: 蔬菜洗好後，用廚房紙巾把水分擦乾。

meaning.en: A sheet of absorbent paper, usually supplied on a roll, used for cleaning or food preparation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常成捲供應，用於清潔或準備食物的吸水紙張。

plainExpression: a professional who prepares and dispenses medicine

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a professional who prepares and dispenses medicine’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「調配與交付藥物，並提供安全用藥建議的醫療專業人員」？

example.text: The pharmacist explained when to take each tablet.

translation.zh-Hant: 藥師說明了每顆藥應在什麼時間服用。

meaning.en: A health professional who prepares and dispenses medicines and advises people on their safe use.
meaning.zh-Hant: 調配與交付藥物，並提供安全用藥建議的醫療專業人員。

plainExpression: a thick dish of boiled grain

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a thick dish of boiled grain’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將穀物或豆類與水或牛奶加熱攪拌至濃稠的餐點，常作為早餐」？

example.text: She added sliced banana to her breakfast porridge.

translation.zh-Hant: 她在早餐的粥裡加入香蕉片。

meaning.en: A thick dish made by heating and stirring grain or legumes with water or milk, often eaten for breakfast.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將穀物或豆類與水或牛奶加熱攪拌至濃稠的餐點，常作為早餐。

plainExpression: a machine used to stitch material

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a machine used to stitch material’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「使用線來縫合布料或其他材料的機械或機電設備」？

example.text: The tailor adjusted the sewing machine before repairing the jacket.

translation.zh-Hant: 裁縫在修補外套前調整了縫紉機。

meaning.en: A mechanical or electromechanical device used to stitch cloth or other material with thread.
meaning.zh-Hant: 使用線來縫合布料或其他材料的機械或機電設備。

plainExpression: a state system of public benefits

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a state system of public benefits’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由稅收支應並提供福利以保障公民生活的國家制度」？

example.text: She applied for social security benefits after retiring.

translation.zh-Hant: 她退休後申請了社會保障給付。

meaning.en: A state system funded through taxation that provides benefits to support citizens' wellbeing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由稅收支應並提供福利以保障公民生活的國家制度。

plainExpression: items used to serve and eat a meal

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘items used to serve and eat a meal’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來擺設餐桌與供應餐點的刀叉、碗盤及玻璃器皿」？

example.text: The restaurant uses reusable tableware instead of disposable plates.

translation.zh-Hant: 這間餐廳使用可重複使用的餐具，不用免洗盤。

meaning.en: The cutlery, dishes, and glassware used to set a table and serve a meal.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來擺設餐桌與供應餐點的刀叉、碗盤及玻璃器皿。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a creamy green fruit’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「酪梨樹結的大型可食用果實，果皮通常呈綠色或深色」？

example.text: Mash the avocado with lime juice to make a simple dip.

translation.zh-Hant: 把酪梨和萊姆汁搗勻，就能做成簡單的沾醬。

meaning.en: The large edible fruit of the avocado tree, usually with green or dark skin.
meaning.zh-Hant: 酪梨樹結的大型可食用果實，果皮通常呈綠色或深色。

plainExpression: to recover from a difficult situation

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘to recover from a difficult situation’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「從挫折或其他負面狀況中迅速恢復，且未留下長期傷害」？

example.text: Sales began to bounce back after the store reopened.

translation.zh-Hant: 商店重新開業後，銷售開始回升。

meaning.en: To recover quickly from a setback or other negative situation without lasting harm.
meaning.zh-Hant: 從挫折或其他負面狀況中迅速恢復，且未留下長期傷害。
